description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte dark green and black finish, featuring a robust polymer lower receiver and a metal upper receiver. The rifle has a prominent pistol grip and a fixed stock, designed for ergonomic handling and stability. The handguard is angular and textured, likely made from reinforced polymer, and features a rail system for mounting accessories. The barrel is relatively short, suggesting a carbine or compact design, and ends with a small muzzle device. The magazine is integrated into the lower receiver, appearing to be a detachable box type. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights mounted on the top rail, suitable for quick target acquisition in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern tactical rifle with a dark green and black finish, fixed stock, and iron sights. It features a short barrel, textured handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, handguard, and short barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rail system, iron sights, and the slim profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same main features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and receiver details.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the handguard, magazine well, and the alignment of the stock and grip.
